tasks.label: Run PromptSharp (Backend & Frontend)
tasks.command: powershell.exe -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd ${workspaceFolder}\backend && npm install --no-fund --no-audit --prefer-offline && npm run dev' ; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd ${workspaceFolder}\frontend && npm install --no-fund --no-audit --prefer-offline && npm run dev'"

tasks.label: Install Dependencies Only
tasks.command: powershell.exe -Command "cd ${workspaceFolder}\backend && npm install --no-fund --no-audit --prefer-offline && cd ${workspaceFolder}\frontend && npm install --no-fund --no-audit --prefer-offline"

tasks.label: Clean and Reinstall Dependencies
tasks.command: powershell.exe -Command "npm cache clean --force && Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ${workspaceFolder}\backend\node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue && Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ${workspaceFolder}\frontend\node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue && cd ${workspaceFolder}\backend && npm install --no-fund --no-audit --prefer-offline && cd ${workspaceFolder}\frontend && npm install --no-fund --no-audit --prefer-offline"
